global_etf_momentum.reason: B006 Global ETF Momentum overlap is reported only when an explicit overlapping backtest result is supplied by the caller.

risk_parity.reason: B010 Risk Parity overlap is reported only when an explicit overlapping backtest result is supplied by the caller.

notes: Comparison window starts on 2020-06-01 because SGOV first becomes available then, which is required by B010 default parameters.
B013 comparison uses the same overlap window for direct parity against B006/B010 and static 60/40.

comparison_bundle.note: Supplemental AGG/EEM pulls were added so the default B006/B010 baselines could be executed on the same overlap window.

research_limitations.disclaimer: research-only artifact; this is not a trading instruction. Regime-adaptive outputs never authorize any paper or production order flow.
